title: Athletics spirit alive and well
description: ATHLETICS NEWS - The athletic spirit was...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"ATHLETICS NEWS - The athletic spirit was definitely alive and well at the u.11 girls shotput event on Friday during the Junior Interhouse Athletics day for Grade 1 to 7 learners.","html":"ATHLETICS NEWS - The athletic spirit was definitely alive and well at the u.11 girls shotput event on Friday during the Junior Interhouse Athletics day for Grade 1 to 7 learners."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The yearly rivalry between Arnott House and Daly House started in fine style, as the young athletes gave it their all in various track and field events.","html":"The yearly rivalry between Arnott House and Daly House started in fine style, as the young athletes gave it their all in various track and field events."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"After the competition, the moms decided to join in on the action and were allowed to add some points to their children's respective houses.","html":"After the competition, the moms decided to join in on the action and were allowed to add some points to their children's respective houses."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Results in the girls' shotput event:"},{"type":"list","items":["Wanda Meyer - first place with an impressive 7,70m throw","Bronwen Jacobs - secured a second place with 7,31m throw","Karen McEwan - grabbed the third place with a solid 7,03m throw"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Arnott House clinched the victory with an impressive 1 446 points while Daly collected 1 314 points.","html":"Arnott House clinched the victory with an impressive 1 446 points while Daly collected 1 314 points."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
